falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above 15% from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Contradicts the bottom pattern's expected price behavior (which typically involves consolidation or decline), invalidating the HOLD signal.
Indicates extreme bullish momentum, directly opposing the current HOLD and suggesting a blowoff top rather than a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to >200% of 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high volume would indicate strong price action conflicting with the current UNKNOWN verdict, suggesting a breakout rather than consolidation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
